title: Pickaxe Armor Trims
description: Make all pickaxes trimmable with all template and materials, upgrade your pickaxe with more than 1300 different looks !
body:
<details>
<summary>get more trims for your items:</summary>

- Sword trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/sword-trims
- Elytra trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-elytra-trims
- Mace trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-mace-trims
- Pickaxe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickaxe-trims
- Axe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/axe-trims
- Shovel trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/shovel-trims

</details>


Pickaxe Trims make pickaxes trimmable with any armor trim and any of the 11 smithing ingredients, making each pickaxe type having exactly 199 variants (including the default one) for a grand total of 1393 different looking pickaxes !!!

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ba6a2872a954698fe75dc79260f17c8f68cb4be.png)

/!\ make sure to download the resourcepack ( https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack ) if you are using the datapack version or the mod version on a server !!!

![all the pickaxes with all the trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d476e51e8f5b630f94f2ef205ee84f649fb89b96.webp)
(this is less than 10% of all the pickaxes you can make!)

You can turn any pickaxe from wooden to netherite pickaxe into a unique tool by putting it on a smithing table with any armor trim and any smithing material, and make your pickaxe fancier than ever !!!

![a selection of some of my favourite pickaxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82af2e266494b7083ea65b83656fb568d535cf67.webp)

Pickaxe Trims is serverside and fully vanilla compatible, players without the resourcepack/mod will only see a regular pickaxe but players with the resourcepack/mod will see every pickaxe trim !

If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !


Geyser/bedrock support : @Toxicdust on discord made a port of all the trims datapacks for GeyserMC, since those are not supported on modrinth, you can find it on the [discord server](https://discord.com/channels/1407508835643428988/1441199863831330929/1509831172174118956)
